title: pilea involucrata
intro: Pilea involucrata, also known as the Chinese pea shrub or Alaskan cleft, is a type of flowering plant native to China and parts of Asia. Traditionally, the plant's leaves and stems have been used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pilea involucrata are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and aid in the treatment of various skin conditions. Pilea involucrata can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
